name: unit anchors removal ledger
scope: This closes the process debt that anchors lacked explicit status. It does not derive electron S_e, hadron scale, or spectrum closure.
remaining_dependent_debts: DEBT-007 absolute electron action offset S_e
DEBT-009 hadron and meson sector split
rules_installed: Mass anchors cannot be used as derivation inputs before formula fingerprint freeze.
Measured particle tables are scoring-only after freeze.
Planck E0 is allowed only as dimensional normalizer, not as spectrum proof.
Quark single-particle anchors are denied for hadron derivation without confinement/triplet/meson operators.
Unknown provenance scale candidates stay quarantined.
OI/Ramanujan/sigma-R are operator constants pending source index, not unit anchors.
